observability_flags.issue: Three auth systems expired simultaneously tonight — mwinit/KMSI (Outlook + SharePoint + Loop), Asana MCP token, hedy session. Auth-stack drift makes every workflow that touches these tools brittle.
observability_flags.recommendation: Richard run `mwinit -f` at next session. Re-authorize Asana MCP. Hedy may recover on next poll. This is a chronic pattern — 3+ days in a row. Consider a pre-EOD auth-health check that warns before starting EOD rather than discovering 6 tool failures mid-run.
